fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the routing number.
The program automatically retrieves the routing number from the No. field on the routing header.
The program uses the routing number to link the routing tool with the routing lines.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different routing tool lines.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the routing tool.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the version code of the routing of this routing tool.
The system copied the code from the Version Code field in the Routing Version table.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the operation number of this routing tool.
The system uses this field internally to assign the routing tool to the operation.
